package rulecoverage

func NegativeMapLookupDoubleAccess() string {
    ruleID := "map_lookup_double_access"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`if _, ok := m[k]; ok { v := m[k] }` \u2014 two map lookups for the same key"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
